# L3 Index Guide — Auto-generated Reference Index

Used by Step 6.6 (bootstrap) and Step Validate V5 (update) in SKILL.md.

## Purpose

`L3-index.md` gives AI a fast lookup of all available reference documents without loading them into context. AI reads the index first, then fetches only the specific file it needs on demand.

## File Location

```
wiki/global/ai-context/L3-reference/L3-index.md
```

## Scan Rules

1. Recursively scan the `wiki/` directory
2. Collect all `.md` files
3. For each file:
   - Record path relative to `wiki/global/ai-context/L3-reference/` (for link generation)
   - Approximate line count: read file → count newlines
   - Description: use first `#` heading content; if none, derive from filename (kebab-case → Title Case)
4. Group entries by top-level subdirectory under `wiki/`

**Exclusions — do NOT index:**
- Files inside `wiki/global/ai-context/` itself (those are L1/L2/L3 context files, not references)
- `README.md` files in spec directories (redundant with `spec.md`)
- Any file with `_draft` or `_wip` in the name

## Output Format

```markdown
# L3 Reference Index
<!-- auto-generated by lcp:bootstrap — run with --validate to refresh -->
<!-- updated: {YYYY-MM-DD} -->

## global
- [architecture.md](../../architecture.md) — Full technical reference ({N} lines)
- [project-overview.md](../../project-overview.md) — Domain & business flows ({N} lines)

## specs
- [001-commission/spec.md](../../../specs/001-commission/spec.md) — Commission event spec
- [002-aggregation/spec.md](../../../specs/002-aggregation/spec.md) — Aggregation event spec

## docs (if wiki/docs/ exists)
- [deployment-guide.md](../../../docs/deployment-guide.md) — Deployment instructions
```

## Link Format

Links must be relative from `wiki/global/ai-context/L3-reference/`:
- `wiki/global/architecture.md` → `../../architecture.md`
- `wiki/specs/001-commission/spec.md` → `../../../specs/001-commission/spec.md`
- `wiki/docs/deployment.md` → `../../../docs/deployment.md`

## manifest.json Update

After creating/updating L3-index.md, update `.claude/manifest.json` L3 section:

```json
{
  "layers": {
    "L3": {
      "on_demand": true,
      "index": "wiki/global/ai-context/L3-reference/L3-index.md",
      "hint": "Full reference docs indexed at: wiki/global/ai-context/L3-reference/L3-index.md"
    }
  }
}
```

## Refresh on Validate

When `--validate` triggers a L3-index update (Step V5):
1. Re-scan `wiki/` completely
2. Diff against current L3-index entries
3. Add new entries, remove dead links
4. Update the `<!-- updated: ... -->` comment
5. Do NOT change the ordering of existing entries — only append/remove
